case_title: OLIVIA PEREZ VS. PETER JAMES WOULFE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, OLIVIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, OLIVIA AS TO DEFENDANT WOULFE, PETER JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PETER JAMES WOULFE IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
